text:
Experimenting with generating WebXR scenes in VR. This demo uses Grok's @xai API to create @threejs scenes on the fly. 

It takes a vague prompt like "VR shooting game," runs it through the reasoning model to flesh out the details then hands that to a code-gen model, uploads to https://t.co/vOBmtE8Aef
